mapper.select: SELECT dd.draft_id, dd.user_id, dd.space_id, dd.draft_key, dd.diary_id, dd.title, dd.date, LEFT(dd.content, 512) AS content, dd.content_format, dd.mood_key, dd.tag_ids, dd.updated_at FROM diary_draft dd LEFT JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = dd.diary_id WHERE dd.user_id = #{userId} AND (dd.diary_id IS NULL OR (d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked = 0)) ORDER BY dd.updated_at DESC

SELECT dd.* FROM diary_draft dd LEFT JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = dd.diary_id WHERE dd.user_id = #{userId} AND dd.draft_key = #{draftKey} AND (dd.diary_id IS NULL OR (d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked = 0))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_draft (user_id, space_id, draft_key, diary_id, title, date, content, content_format, mood_key, tag_ids) VALUES (#{userId}, (SELECT space_id FROM diary_space WHERE personal_owner_id = #{userId}), #{draftKey}, #{diaryId}, #{title}, #{date}, #{content}, #{contentFormat}, #{moodKey}, #{tagIds}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE diary_id = VALUES(diary_id), title = VALUES(title), date = VALUES(date), content = VALUES(content), content_format = VALUES(content_format), mood_key = VALUES(mood_key), tag_ids = VALUES(tag_ids), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM diary_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draft_id = #{draftId}
DELETE FROM diary_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draft_key = #{draftKey}
